note: Pin by immutable commit SHA (`ref`), not the mutable tag. `tag` records the human-friendly release that SHA belongs to; keep them in sync. The contract content (contract.json + CONTRACT.md) is NOT committed here: GitHub is the single source of truth. It is fetched from upstream@ref at wheel-build time (hatch_build.py) and by the scripts/Makefile, and every fetch is verified against the per-file `sha256` digests below (build/pull fails on mismatch, so a repointed tag or tampered content is caught). nix/package.nix must pin the same SHA in its `rev` (CI asserts this). Bump the pin deliberately with `make contract-pull REF=<commit-sha>`, which refetches, re-hashes, and rewrites this file.
